entries.current_value: DATEDIF("Effet","Échéance","d")+1 denominator with in-window remaining days only
entries.justification: PPNA now follows the workbook formulas for "nb de jours contrat" and "nb de jours non aquise".
Negative and zero premiums are retained for actuarial treatment and auditability.
entries.source_reference: Phase 10 clarification for PPNA premium treatment

entries.justification: Legislative coefficient must be configurable and not hardcoded.
Legislative coefficient must be configurable and not hardcoded.
Contract-year count is treated as workbook helper metadata, not required actuarial input.
entries.source_reference: Phase 10 clarification on NB d'année contrat

entries.current_value: if Date de clôture < "Date de déclaration" then 0; if "Date de déclaration" < Date de clôture < "Date de notification reglement /REJET" then "Montant sinistre déclaré"; else REJET=>0, SAP=>"Montant sinistre déclaré", REGLE=>max(0,"Montant sinistre déclaré"-"Montant réglé")
entries.justification: SAP engine now follows the mentor-provided formula and the updated workbook formula path.
entries.source_reference: SAP_FORMULA.md and level 01-DATA SAP groupe.xlsx "SAP GROUPE (2)"!AC3:AC236

entries.justification: Rows with blank "Date de notification reglement /REJET" still evaluate through the status-based branch after "Date de déclaration".
entries.source_reference: level 01-DATA SAP groupe.xlsx "SAP GROUPE (2)"!AC3:AC236 with blank Y rows

entries.justification: The "ETAT DE SORTIE" sheet is a display template only; PPNA reconciliation uses the formula-backed " PRODUCTION" sheet.
entries.source_reference: level 01-level2-ÉCHANTILLON DATA PPNA.xlsx!ETAT DE SORTIE has no formulas

entries.justification: Volume-weighted Chain Ladder is the method implemented in the workbook. Factors and reserves verified cell-by-cell against cached values.
entries.source_reference: level 02-ÉCHANTILLON DATA IBNR.xlsx "calcule IBNR"!C29:E29 and rows 33..36

entries.justification: Workbook restricts triangle to the 4 most recent occurrence years. Earlier years are treated as fully developed with reserve 0.
entries.source_reference: level 02-ÉCHANTILLON DATA IBNR.xlsx "calcule IBNR" rows 15..20 (4-year triangle window)

entries.justification: Valuation year 2025 matches the IBNR workbook sample. Configurable in legislative.yaml without code changes.

Two modes are available and user-selectable via the UI / legislative.yaml: (1) mixed — one triangle over all ADE products, matches workbook reference; (2) homogeneous_by_product — one independent triangle per product (IMMO, CONSO, WARDA, AC-ELITE), satisfying the actuarial rule of not mixing heterogeneous products. Reconciliation reference uses mixed mode. Set segment_by_product: true in legislative.yaml for homogeneous mode.
entries.source_reference: Session 2026-04-18 — both modes implemented; UI toggle via legislative.yaml segment_by_product

entries.justification: Product column contains mixed-case variants of the same label. BaseDatasetLoader category normalization collapses them to lowercase canonical form.
entries.source_reference: level 02-ÉCHANTILLON DATA IBNR.xlsx "base ADE" col B product label variants

entries.current_value: process variance only; estimation variance excluded
entries.justification: Mack MSE calculation uses only process variance. Estimation variance is excluded as a conservative simplification. Full Mack formula would add a second term.

entries.current_value: total_se = root-sum-of-squares(se per AY); AY correlations ignored
entries.justification: Portfolio-level Mack SE is naïve root-sum-of-squares. Full Mack includes cross-AY covariance terms which are omitted here.
BF prior ultimate is derived from the mature-year ULT/dev0 ratio. This is not actuary-validated; mentor review recommended before production use.
Two Benktander iterations produce a credibility blend between BF and CL. k is configurable via legislative.yaml.

entries.current_value: Pearson residual resampling without Poisson process-noise stage
entries.justification: Bootstrap uses ODP Pearson residual resampling only. Full two-stage Bootstrap would additionally sample from a Poisson distribution per cell.
